entries.reason: Single Responsibility — The draft focuses on one concern: enabling cross-import resolution for presets via loader hook extension.; Unambiguous Requirements — Requirements use concrete paths, resolution order, cache behavior, and fallback behavior that are testable.; Complete Context — Several requirements are imperative but not consistently written with explicit trigger-condition plus expected “shall” outcome pairs.; No Hardcoded Secrets — No API keys, tokens, passwords, or secret literals appear in the draft content.; Prioritize Requirements — There are five requirements but no explicit priority ranking is provided.; Impact on Existing Features — A dedicated impact section lists affected files and explicitly states where behavior remains unchanged.; Present Recommendations with Reasoning — Q&A answers are recommendation-first and cite basis from issue intent and existing resolver patterns.; Explore Before Asking — The draft resolves key questions directly and shows user approval, with no avoidable user questions left open.; Proactively Raise Related Implications — The draft proactively covers scope boundaries, alternatives, caching tradeoffs, and feature impact.; Confirm Brainstorm vs. Decision Before Critiquing — The draft records approval but does not explicitly confirm brainstorming vs decision mode before rejecting alternatives.; Capture Digressions in draft.md — No clear digression thread is present in this content, so this guardrail is not applicable here.; Draft Stays at Requirements Level — It includes implementation-level details (specific files, loader injection mechanics, cache structure) beyond pure RFP-level requirements.; Backward — Compatible CLI Interface — No CLI command/option removal or semantic change is proposed, so a migration plan is not required.
line 112: unchecked task/question (- [ ] なし（draft 時点で主要論点は確定済み）)

REQ — 1 3層探索（project→user→builtin）で `sdd-forge/presets/<name>/<subpath>` を解決 — `resolve()` が `PRESETS_PREFIX` を判定し、各層の `<subpath>.js` を順番に `existsSync` して最初の一致を返している。; REQ — 2 未検出時は loader で例外を投げず Node 標準解決へ委譲 — 3層でヒットしない場合に `nextResolve(specifier, context)` へフォールスルーしている。; REQ — 3 `sdd-forge/api` など既存 `sdd-forge/<subpath>` の挙動非回帰 — preset 分岐外は従来どおり `<pkg>/src/<subpath>.js` へ解決し、回帰テストも通過している。; REQ — 4 同一 specifier の再解決で in-memory キャッシュ再利用 — `Map` キャッシュで2回目以降は即返却し、fs再探索しないことをテストで確認済み。; REQ — 5 CLI から projectRoot（`SDD_WORK_ROOT` 相当）を loader に受け渡し、未特定時は project 層探索をスキップ — `register(..., { data: { projectRoot: safeRepoRoot(), userHome } })` と `if (projectRoot)` 条件で実装されている。; No Hardcoded Secrets — No API keys, passwords, tokens, or similar secrets appear in the provided spec or diff.; No Silent Error Swallowing — `safeRepoRoot()` catches all errors and returns `null` without logging or re-throwing.; Bounded Resource Usage — The in-memory `cache` (`Map`) has no explicit size bound, so growth is unbounded over process lifetime.; No Sensitive Data in Logs — No logging of credentials or PII is shown; this article is inapplicable to the provided changes.; No Disabling Existing Tests — No evidence of skipping, commenting out, or deleting existing tests.; Escalate When New Tests Break Existing Tests — No test-failure handling scenario is shown in the provided content, so this is inapplicable.; Do Not Modify Existing Tests Without Approval — No existing test modifications are present in the diff.; Flag Tests That Become Irrelevant — No obsolete-test transition is shown in the provided content, so this is inapplicable.; Exit Code Contract — No code path shown that reports failure with exit code `0`.; No Synchronous I/O in Hot Paths — `resolve()` performs `fs.existsSync(...)` during module resolution, i.e., synchronous I/O in a repeated import path.; Validate User Input at Entry Point — The shown changes do not add new unvalidated CLI/stdin input handling paths, so this is inapplicable.

REQ — 1 3層探索で `sdd-forge/presets/<name>/<subpath>` を解決 — `project -> user -> builtin` 順で `<subpath>.js` の存在確認を行い、最初の一致を file URL で返す実装になっている。; REQ — 2 未検出時は Node 標準解決へ委譲 — 3層で見つからない場合は `nextResolve(specifier, context)` にフォールスルーし、loader で独自 throw していない。; REQ — 3 既存 `sdd-forge/<subpath>` 解決の非回帰 — `sdd-forge/presets/...` 以外は従来どおり `./src/<subpath>.js` へ解決し、回帰防止テストも通過している。; REQ — 4 同一 specifier の再解決はキャッシュ再利用 — `Map` に解決結果を保持して2回目以降は即返却し、fs 再アクセスなしを確認するテストが通過している。; REQ — 5 CLI から project root 相当を loader に連携し未指定時は project 層をスキップ — `register(..., { data: { projectRoot, userHome }})` で注入し、loader 側は `projectRoot` がない場合に project tier を探索しない実装。; No Hardcoded Secrets — No API keys, passwords, tokens, or similar secrets are present in the diff.; No Silent Error Swallowing — `fileExists()` uses `catch { return false; }`, which silently discards filesystem errors.; Bounded Resource Usage — Cache growth is explicitly bounded by `MAX_CACHE_SIZE = 1024` with eviction logic.; No Sensitive Data in Logs — No logging of secrets or PII is introduced (no relevant logging added).; No Disabling Existing Tests — No tests are skipped, commented out, deleted, or altered in this change.; Escalate When New Tests Break Existing Tests — Inapplicable: no test execution outcome or breakage handling is shown in the provided content.; Do Not Modify Existing Tests Without Approval — No existing test files are modified or deleted in the diff.; Flag Tests That Become Irrelevant — Inapplicable: no evidence of obsolete tests or test-suite triage actions is included.; Exit Code Contract — Inapplicable: changes are in loader resolution and startup registration, not command failure exit-code handling.; No Synchronous I/O in Hot Paths — Filesystem checks use async `fsp.access`; no synchronous I/O is added in resolve paths.; Validate User Input at Entry Point — Inapplicable: provided changes do not add new CLI/stdin entry-point parsing or user-input plumbing.

REQ — 1 3-tier resolution for `sdd-forge/presets/<name>/<subpath>` — `resolve()` adds preset-specific lookup in project → user → builtin order and returns first existing `.js` URL.; REQ — 2 fall through on misses without loader-thrown not-found error — when no tier matches, loader returns `nextResolve(...)` instead of throwing custom resolution errors.; REQ — 3 existing non-preset `sdd-forge/<subpath>` behavior unchanged — non-preset branch still resolves directly to `./src/<subpath>.js`, preserving `sdd-forge/api` path semantics.; REQ — 4 process-lifetime in-memory cache for repeated specifier resolution — successful preset resolutions are stored in a module-level `Map` and reused on subsequent imports (validated by cache/no-fs test evidence).; REQ — 5 CLI must pass project root and skip project-tier search when root is not determinable — CLI now always passes `projectRoot: repoRoot()` and does not add explicit undeterminable-context handling, so skip behavior is only implemented in loader if `projectRoot` is null but not ensured by CLI integration.

REQ — 1 3層探索で `sdd-forge/presets/<name>/<subpath>` を解決 — `src/loader.js` が project→user→builtin の順で `<subpath>.js` を探索し、最初のヒットを返す実装になっている。; REQ — 2 未検出時は Node 標準解決へ委譲 — 3層すべてミス時に `nextResolve(specifier, context)` へフォールスルーし、loader独自エラーを投げない。; REQ — 3 既存 `sdd-forge/<subpath>` 挙動の非回帰 — 非 `presets` の `sdd-forge/*` は従来どおり `src/<subpath>.js` に解決され、`sdd-forge/api` 非回帰テストも通過している。; REQ — 4 同一specifier解決のプロセス内キャッシュ — `Map` キャッシュで2回目以降は即時返却し、テストでも「2回目はfsアクセスなし」が確認されている。; REQ — 5 CLIからprojectRootをloaderへ引き渡し・未特定時スキップ — `register(..., { data: { projectRoot, userHome } })` で渡し、`projectRoot` が `null` の場合 loader 側で project tier を探索しない実装。; No Hardcoded Secrets — No API keys, passwords, tokens, or similar secrets are present in the shown changes.; No Silent Error Swallowing — `fileExists` only suppresses expected `ENOENT`/`ENOTDIR` misses and re-throws all other errors.; Bounded Resource Usage — Resolution cache is explicitly bounded (`MAX_CACHE_SIZE = 1024`) with eviction logic.; No Sensitive Data in Logs — The diff introduces no logging of credentials or PII.; No Disabling Existing Tests — No test skipping, deletion, or comment-out changes are shown.; Escalate When New Tests Break Existing Tests — No evidence of new tests breaking existing tests in the provided content, so this is inapplicable.; Do Not Modify Existing Tests Without Approval — No existing test modifications are included in the diff.; Flag Tests That Become Irrelevant — No test removals or feature-driven test obsolescence handling is shown, so this is inapplicable.; Exit Code Contract — The shown code does not force success exit codes for failing command paths.; No Synchronous I/O in Hot Paths — Loader path checks use async `fsp.access`; no sync file I/O in the resolution loop.; Validate User Input at Entry Point — `process.env.SDD_FORGE_WORK_ROOT` is consumed directly in `resolveProjectRoot()` without explicit validation at entry.
